def eligible_for_weight_management_program(self) -> bool:
        gender_options = ['transgender', 'non-binary', 'male', 'female', 'gender neutral']
        age_options = [28, 30, 31, 44, 45, 46, 59, 60, 61]
        race_options = ['asian', 'white', 'black', 'hispanic', 'indian']
        employment_options = ['employed', 'retired', 'unemployed', 'student']
        education_options = ['high school', 'college', 'bachelor', 'master', 'doctor']
        marital_options = ['single', 'married', 'widowed', 'divorced', 'legally separated']
        religion_options = ['christianity', 'islam', 'atheist', 'hinduism', 'buddhism']

        return (
            self.gender.lower() in gender_options and
            self.age in age_options and
            self.race.lower() in race_options and
            self.employment_status.lower() in employment_options and
            self.education.lower() in education_options and
            self.marital_status.lower() in marital_options and
            self.religion.lower() in religion_options and
            self.BMI in [30.0, 40.0]
        )
